name: Kira Stonefang
backstory: Kira grew up in the Iron Reaches, a lawless borderland where survival was everything. She joined the Ironclad Mercenary Guild at fifteen, rising to captain by twenty-two through sheer grit and tactical cunning. She distrusts nobles, politicians, and wizards — but her word, once given, is iron. She has seen too many people die for other people's causes and is extremely suspicious of strangers asking too many questions.
speech_style: Direct and terse. Uses military jargon and mercenary slang. No flowery language. Gets to the point fast. Occasional dark humor.
